_comment: Coder-Next coprocessor with (a) text/coding POOLED across Mac (MLX) + box (qwentescence, llama.cpp >= b9596), and (b) a multimodal backend for vision/OCR (Coder-Next is text-only). Copy to ~/.qwen-coprocessor-stack/config.json. Routing (src/backends.ts): heavy/coding prompts -> weighted round-robin across the two 'heavy' text backends (the Coder-Next pool, both machines used simultaneously); qwen_oneshot_vision -> the 'multimodal' backend; qwen_embed/qwen_rerank -> their modality. See tests/routing-pool-vision.test.ts.

backends._comment: Coder-Next on the Mac (MLX/Metal, M4 Max). Higher weight = faster host gets more of the pool.
Coder-Next on the box (qwentescence, llama.cpp b9596 Vulkan; b9090 crashes on the Gated-Delta-Net arch). Pools with coder-mac for coding/text.
Vision/OCR backend — qwen3.6-35B-A3B with mmproj (Coder-Next has no vision). qwen_oneshot_vision routes here by modality. 'fast' keeps it out of the heavy coding pool.
